MySQL 语句大全

一条语句 · 一个例子 · 即查即用

目录

DDL 数据定义 DML 数据操作 DCL 数据控制 TCL 事务控制 数据库操作 表操作 列操作 索引 视图 存储过程 函数 触发器 事件 用户与权限 SELECT 查询 JOIN 连接 子查询 聚合函数 字符串函数 数值函数 日期时间函数 条件函数 窗口函数 类型转换 加密函数 JSON 函数 全文搜索 系统信息 备份恢复 锁表 变量 预处理语句

DDL — 数据定义语言

语句示例
CREATE DATABASECREATE DATABASE mydb CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
DROP DATABASEDROP DATABASE IF EXISTS mydb;
CREATE TABLECREATE TABLE users (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE ASCREATE TABLE users_backup AS SELECT * FROM users;
CREATE TABLE LIKECREATE TABLE users_copy LIKE users;
ALTER TABLEALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN age INT AFTER name;
DROP TABLEDROP TABLE IF EXISTS users;
TRUNCATE TABLETRUNCATE TABLE logs;
RENAME TABLERENAME TABLE old_name TO new_name;

DML — 数据操作语言

语句示例
INSERTINSERT INTO users (name, email) VALUES ('张三', 'zhangsan@example.com');
INSERT 多行INSERT INTO users (name, email) VALUES ('李四', 'lisi@example.com'), ('王五', 'wangwu@example.com');
INSERT SELECTINSERT INTO users_backup SELECT * FROM users WHERE active = 1;
INSERT IGNOREINSERT IGNORE INTO users (name, email) VALUES ('张三', 'zhangsan@example.com');
REPLACEREPLACE INTO users (id, name, email) VALUES (1, '张三', 'new@example.com');
UPDATEUPDATE users SET status = 1 WHERE id = 5;
UPDATE 多表UPDATE users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id SET u.balance = u.balance - o.amount WHERE o.status = 'paid';
DELETEDELETE FROM users WHERE id = 10;
DELETE 多表DELETE u FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = 'cancelled';
SELECTSELECT id, name, email FROM users WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;

DCL — 数据控制语言

语句示例
GRANTGRANT SELECT, INSERT ON mydb.* TO 'user1'@'localhost';
GRANT ALLGRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON mydb.* TO 'admin'@'%' WITH GRANT OPTION;
REVOKEREVOKE INSERT ON mydb.* FROM 'user1'@'localhost';
REVOKE ALLREVOKE ALL PRIVILEGES, GRANT OPTION FROM 'user1'@'localhost';

TCL — 事务控制语言

语句示例
START TRANSACTIONSTART TRANSACTION;
BEGINBEGIN;
COMMITCOMMIT;
ROLLBACKROLLBACK;
SAVEPOINTSAVEPOINT sp1;
ROLLBACK TO SAVEPOINTROLLBACK TO SAVEPOINT sp1;
RELEASE SAVEPOINTRELEASE SAVEPOINT sp1;
SET AUTOCOMMITSET autocommit = 0;

数据库操作

语句示例
SHOW DATABASESSHOW DATABASES;
SHOW DATABASES LIKESHOW DATABASES LIKE 'test%';
USEUSE mydb;
SELECT DATABASE()SELECT DATABASE();
ALTER DATABASEALTER DATABASE mydb CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci;

表操作

语句示例
SHOW TABLESSHOW TABLES;
SHOW TABLES LIKESHOW TABLES LIKE 'user%';
DESCRIBEDESCRIBE users;
DESCDESC users;
SHOW COLUMNSSHOW COLUMNS FROM users;
SHOW CREATE TABLESHOW CREATE TABLE users;
SHOW TABLE STATUSSHOW TABLE STATUS LIKE 'users';
CHECK TABLECHECK TABLE users;
REPAIR TABLEREPAIR TABLE users;
OPTIMIZE TABLEOPTIMIZE TABLE users;
ANALYZE TABLEANALYZE TABLE users;

列操作（ALTER TABLE）

语句示例
ADD COLUMNALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN phone VARCHAR(20) AFTER email;
ADD COLUMN 多列ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN age INT, ADD COLUMN gender TINYINT;
DROP COLUMNALTER TABLE users DROP COLUMN phone;
MODIFY COLUMNALTER TABLE users MODIFY COLUMN name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL;
CHANGE COLUMNALTER TABLE users CHANGE COLUMN name username VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL;
RENAME COLUMNALTER TABLE users RENAME COLUMN name TO username;
SET DEFAULTALTER TABLE users ALTER COLUMN status SET DEFAULT 1;
DROP DEFAULTALTER TABLE users ALTER COLUMN status DROP DEFAULT;
ADD PRIMARY KEYALTER TABLE users ADD PRIMARY KEY (id);
DROP PRIMARY KEYALTER TABLE users DROP PRIMARY KEY;
ADD FOREIGN KEYALTER TABLE orders ADD CONSTRAINT fk_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;
DROP FOREIGN KEYALTER TABLE orders DROP FOREIGN KEY fk_user;

索引

语句示例
CREATE INDEXCREATE INDEX idx_name ON users(name);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEXCREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_email ON users(email);
CREATE COMPOSITE INDEXCREATE INDEX idx_name_status ON users(name, status);
CREATE FULLTEXT INDEXCREATE FULLTEXT INDEX idx_content ON articles(title, content);
DROP INDEXDROP INDEX idx_name ON users;
SHOW INDEXSHOW INDEX FROM users;
ALTER ADD INDEXALTER TABLE users ADD INDEX idx_age(age);
ALTER DROP INDEXALTER TABLE users DROP INDEX idx_age;

视图

语句示例
CREATE VIEWCREATE VIEW v_active_users AS SELECT id, name, email FROM users WHERE status = 1;
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEWCREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_active_users AS SELECT id, name, email, phone FROM users WHERE status = 1;
ALTER VIEWALTER VIEW v_active_users AS SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE status = 1;
DROP VIEWDROP VIEW IF EXISTS v_active_users;
SHOW CREATE VIEWSHOW CREATE VIEW v_active_users;

存储过程

语句示例
CREATE PROCEDURECREATE PROCEDURE get_users(IN uid INT) BEGIN SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = uid; END
CREATE PROCEDURE 多参数CREATE PROCEDURE add_user(IN uname VARCHAR(50), IN uemail VARCHAR(100)) BEGIN INSERT INTO users(name, email) VALUES(uname, uemail); END
CREATE PROCEDURE OUTCREATE PROCEDURE count_users(OUT total INT) BEGIN SELECT COUNT(*) INTO total FROM users; END
CALLCALL get_users(1);
DROP PROCEDUREDROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS get_users;
SHOW CREATE PROCEDURESHOW CREATE PROCEDURE get_users;
SHOW PROCEDURE STATUSSHOW PROCEDURE STATUS LIKE 'get_users';

函数

语句示例
CREATE FUNCTIONCREATE FUNCTION get_full_name(first_name VARCHAR(50), last_name VARCHAR(50)) RETURNS VARCHAR(101) DETERMINISTIC RETURN CONCAT(first_name, ' ', last_name);
DROP FUNCTIONDROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS get_full_name;
SHOW CREATE FUNCTIONSHOW CREATE FUNCTION get_full_name;
SHOW FUNCTION STATUSSHOW FUNCTION STATUS LIKE 'get_full_name';

触发器

语句示例
CREATE TRIGGER BEFORE INSERTCREATE TRIGGER before_user_insert BEFORE INSERT ON users FOR EACH ROW SET NEW.created_at = NOW();
CREATE TRIGGER AFTER INSERTCREATE TRIGGER after_user_insert AFTER INSERT ON users FOR EACH ROW INSERT INTO logs(action, user_id, time) VALUES('insert', NEW.id, NOW());
CREATE TRIGGER BEFORE UPDATECREATE TRIGGER before_user_update BEFORE UPDATE ON users FOR EACH ROW SET NEW.updated_at = NOW();
CREATE TRIGGER AFTER DELETECREATE TRIGGER after_user_delete AFTER DELETE ON users FOR EACH ROW INSERT INTO logs(action, user_id, time) VALUES('delete', OLD.id, NOW());
DROP TRIGGERDROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS before_user_insert;
SHOW TRIGGERSSHOW TRIGGERS LIKE 'users';

事件（定时任务）

语句示例
CREATE EVENTCREATE EVENT clean_logs ON SCHEDULE EVERY 1 DAY STARTS '2026-01-01 00:00:00' DO DELETE FROM logs WHERE created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);
CREATE EVENT ATCREATE EVENT one_time_job ON SCHEDULE AT '2026-12-31 23:59:59' DO INSERT INTO logs(action) VALUES('year_end');
ALTER EVENTALTER EVENT clean_logs ON SCHEDULE EVERY 7 DAY;
DROP EVENTDROP EVENT IF EXISTS clean_logs;
SHOW EVENTSSHOW EVENTS;
ALTER EVENT DISABLEALTER EVENT clean_logs DISABLE;
ALTER EVENT ENABLEALTER EVENT clean_logs ENABLE;

用户与权限

语句示例
CREATE USERCREATE USER 'user1'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'password123';
CREATE USER 插件CREATE USER 'user2'@'%' IDENTIFIED WITH mysql_native_password BY 'password123';
ALTER USERALTER USER 'user1'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'new_password';
ALTER USER 过期ALTER USER 'user1'@'localhost' PASSWORD EXPIRE;
DROP USERDROP USER 'user1'@'localhost';
RENAME USERRENAME USER 'old_name'@'localhost' TO 'new_name'@'localhost';
SET PASSWORDSET PASSWORD FOR 'user1'@'localhost' = 'new_password';
SHOW GRANTSSHOW GRANTS FOR 'user1'@'localhost';
FLUSH PRIVILEGESFLUSH PRIVILEGES;

SELECT 查询子句

语句示例
SELECT DISTINCTSELECT DISTINCT city FROM users;
WHERESELECT * FROM users WHERE age > 18 AND status = 1;
WHERE INSELECT * FROM users WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3, 5);
WHERE BETWEENSELECT * FROM orders WHERE amount BETWEEN 100 AND 500;
WHERE LIKESELECT * FROM users WHERE name LIKE '张%';
WHERE REGEXPSELECT * FROM users WHERE email REGEXP '^[a-z]+@example\\.com$';
WHERE IS NULLSELECT * FROM users WHERE phone IS NULL;
WHERE IS NOT NULLSELECT * FROM users WHERE phone IS NOT NULL;
WHERE EXISTSSELECT * FROM users WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders WHERE orders.user_id = users.id);
ORDER BYSELECT * FROM users ORDER BY age DESC, name ASC;
GROUP BYSELECT city, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users GROUP BY city;
HAVINGSELECT city, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users GROUP BY city HAVING cnt > 5;
LIMITSELECT * FROM users LIMIT 10;
LIMIT OFFSETSELECT * FROM users LIMIT 10 OFFSET 20;
UNIONSELECT name FROM users UNION SELECT name FROM admins;
UNION ALLSELECT name FROM users UNION ALL SELECT name FROM admins;
INTERSECTSELECT name FROM users INTERSECT SELECT name FROM admins;
EXCEPTSELECT name FROM users EXCEPT SELECT name FROM admins;
SELECT INTO OUTFILESELECT * FROM users INTO OUTFILE '/tmp/users.csv' FIELDS TERMINATED BY ',' ENCLOSED BY '"' LINES TERMINATED BY '\n';
LOAD DATALOAD DATA INFILE '/tmp/users.csv' INTO TABLE users FIELDS TERMINATED BY ',' ENCLOSED BY '"' LINES TERMINATED BY '\n' IGNORE 1 ROWS;

JOIN 连接

语句示例
INNER JOINSELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id;
LEFT JOINSELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id;
RIGHT JOINSELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u RIGHT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id;
CROSS JOINSELECT u.name, p.product_name FROM users u CROSS JOIN products p;
SELF JOINSELECT a.name AS employee, b.name AS manager FROM users a LEFT JOIN users b ON a.manager_id = b.id;
NATURAL JOINSELECT * FROM users NATURAL JOIN profiles;
STRAIGHT_JOINSELECT STRAIGHT_JOIN u.name, o.amount FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id;

子查询

语句示例
标量子查询SELECT name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE orders.user_id = users.id) AS order_count FROM users;
IN 子查询SELECT * FROM users WHERE id IN (SELECT user_id FROM orders WHERE amount > 100);
NOT IN 子查询SELECT * FROM users WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM orders);
EXISTS 子查询SELECT * FROM users WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders WHERE orders.user_id = users.id AND amount > 500);
ANY / SOMESELECT * FROM users WHERE age > ANY (SELECT age FROM admins);
ALLSELECT * FROM users WHERE age > ALL (SELECT age FROM admins);
FROM 子查询SELECT avg_order FROM (SELECT user_id, AVG(amount) AS avg_order FROM orders GROUP BY user_id) AS t WHERE avg_order > 200;
WITH (CTE)WITH top_users AS (SELECT user_id, SUM(amount) AS total FROM orders GROUP BY user_id) SELECT u.name, t.total FROM users u JOIN top_users t ON u.id = t.user_id;
WITH RECURSIVEWITH RECURSIVE cte AS (SELECT 1 AS n UNION ALL SELECT n + 1 FROM cte WHERE n < 10) SELECT * FROM cte;

聚合函数

语句示例
COUNTSELECT COUNT(*) FROM users;
COUNT DISTINCTSELECT COUNT(DISTINCT city) FROM users;
SUMSELECT SUM(amount) FROM orders WHERE status = 'paid';
AVGSELECT AVG(amount) FROM orders;
MAXSELECT MAX(amount) FROM orders;
MINSELECT MIN(amount) FROM orders;
GROUP_CONCATSELECT GROUP_CONCAT(name SEPARATOR ', ') FROM users WHERE city = '北京';
GROUP_CONCAT DISTINCTSELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT city ORDER BY city SEPARATOR ' | ') FROM users;
STDDEVSELECT STDDEV(amount) FROM orders;
VARIANCESELECT VARIANCE(amount) FROM orders;

字符串函数

语句示例
CONCATSELECT CONCAT(first_name, ' ', last_name) AS full_name FROM users;
CONCAT_WSSELECT CONCAT_WS('-', year, month, day) AS date_str FROM logs;
LENGTHSELECT LENGTH(name) FROM users;
CHAR_LENGTHSELECT CHAR_LENGTH(name) FROM users;
UPPERSELECT UPPER(name) FROM users;
LOWERSELECT LOWER(email) FROM users;
TRIMSELECT TRIM(name) FROM users;
LTRIMSELECT LTRIM(name) FROM users;
RTRIMSELECT RTRIM(name) FROM users;
SUBSTRINGSELECT SUBSTRING(name, 1, 3) FROM users;
SUBSTRING_INDEXSELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(email, '@', 1) FROM users;
LEFTSELECT LEFT(name, 2) FROM users;
RIGHTSELECT RIGHT(phone, 4) FROM users;
REPLACESELECT REPLACE(email, '@old.com', '@new.com') FROM users;
REVERSESELECT REVERSE(name) FROM users;
REPEATSELECT REPEAT('*', 5);
LPADSELECT LPAD(id, 6, '0') FROM users;
RPADSELECT RPAD(name, 20, '.') FROM users;
INSTRSELECT INSTR(email, '@') FROM users;
LOCATESELECT LOCATE('@', email) FROM users;
FIND_IN_SETSELECT FIND_IN_SET('admin', roles) FROM users;
FORMATSELECT FORMAT(1234567.89, 2);
ASCIISELECT ASCII('A');
CHARSELECT CHAR(65, 66, 67);
HEXSELECT HEX('hello');
UNHEXSELECT UNHEX('68656C6C6F');

数值函数

语句示例
ROUNDSELECT ROUND(123.456, 2);
CEIL / CEILINGSELECT CEIL(123.1);
FLOORSELECT FLOOR(123.9);
ABSSELECT ABS(-123);
MODSELECT MOD(10, 3);
POWERSELECT POWER(2, 10);
SQRTSELECT SQRT(16);
RANDSELECT RAND();
RAND 种子SELECT RAND(42);
TRUNCATESELECT TRUNCATE(123.456, 2);
SIGNSELECT SIGN(-10);
GREATESTSELECT GREATEST(10, 20, 5, 30);
LEASTSELECT LEAST(10, 20, 5, 30);
PISELECT PI();
RADIANSSELECT RADIANS(180);
DEGREESSELECT DEGREES(PI());
SIN / COS / TANSELECT SIN(PI()/2), COS(0), TAN(PI()/4);
LOGSELECT LOG(2, 8);
LOG10SELECT LOG10(100);
EXPSELECT EXP(1);

日期时间函数

语句示例
NOWSELECT NOW();
CURDATESELECT CURDATE();
CURTIMESELECT CURTIME();
DATESELECT DATE(NOW());
TIMESELECT TIME(NOW());
YEARSELECT YEAR(created_at) FROM users;
MONTHSELECT MONTH(created_at) FROM users;
DAYSELECT DAY(created_at) FROM users;
HOURSELECT HOUR(created_at) FROM users;
MINUTESELECT MINUTE(created_at) FROM users;
SECONDSELECT SECOND(created_at) FROM users;
DAYNAMESELECT DAYNAME(created_at) FROM users;
MONTHNAMESELECT MONTHNAME(created_at) FROM users;
QUARTERSELECT QUARTER(created_at) FROM users;
WEEKSELECT WEEK(created_at) FROM users;
DAYOFWEEKSELECT DAYOFWEEK(created_at) FROM users;
DAYOFYEARSELECT DAYOFYEAR(created_at) FROM users;
DATE_FORMATSELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y年%m月%d日 %H:%i:%s') FROM users;
STR_TO_DATESELECT STR_TO_DATE('2026-07-23', '%Y-%m-%d');
DATE_ADDSELECT DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY);
DATE_SUBSELECT DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH);
DATEDIFFSELECT DATEDIFF('2026-12-31', '2026-01-01');
TIMEDIFFSELECT TIMEDIFF('18:00:00', '09:00:00');
TIMESTAMPDIFFSELECT TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, birth_date, NOW()) AS age FROM users;
UNIX_TIMESTAMPSELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW());
FROM_UNIXTIMESELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(1753267200);
EXTRACTSELECT EXTRACT(YEAR_MONTH FROM created_at) FROM users;
LAST_DAYSELECT LAST_DAY(NOW());
MAKEDATESELECT MAKEDATE(2026, 200);

条件函数

语句示例
IFSELECT IF(age >= 18, '成年', '未成年') AS status FROM users;
IFNULLSELECT IFNULL(phone, '无') FROM users;
NULLIFSELECT NULLIF(amount, 0) FROM orders;
COALESCESELECT COALESCE(phone, mobile, '无') FROM users;
CASE 简单SELECT CASE status WHEN 0 THEN '禁用' WHEN 1 THEN '正常' ELSE '未知' END FROM users;
CASE 搜索SELECT CASE WHEN score >= 90 THEN 'A' WHEN score >= 80 THEN 'B' WHEN score >= 60 THEN 'C' ELSE 'D' END FROM students;

窗口函数

语句示例
ROW_NUMBERSELECT name, score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY score DESC) AS rank FROM students;
RANKSELECT name, score, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY score DESC) AS rank FROM students;
DENSE_RANKSELECT name, score, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY score DESC) AS rank FROM students;
NTILESELECT name, score, NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY score DESC) AS quartile FROM students;
LAGSELECT name, score, LAG(score, 1) OVER (ORDER BY created_at) AS prev_score FROM students;
LEADSELECT name, score, LEAD(score, 1) OVER (ORDER BY created_at) AS next_score FROM students;
FIRST_VALUESELECT name, score, FIRST_VALUE(score) OVER (PARTITION BY class ORDER BY score DESC) AS best FROM students;
LAST_VALUESELECT name, score, LAST_VALUE(score) OVER (PARTITION BY class ORDER BY score ASC RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS worst FROM students;
SUM OVERSELECT date, amount, SUM(amount) OVER (ORDER BY date) AS running_total FROM orders;
AVG OVERSELECT date, amount, AVG(amount) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_7day FROM orders;
PARTITION BYSELECT city, name, salary, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY city ORDER BY salary DESC) AS city_rank FROM employees;

类型转换

语句示例
CASTSELECT CAST('123' AS UNSIGNED);
CAST AS DATESELECT CAST('2026-07-23' AS DATE);
CAST AS CHARSELECT CAST(12345 AS CHAR);
CAST AS DECIMALSELECT CAST('123.45' AS DECIMAL(10,2));
CONVERTSELECT CONVERT('123' USING utf8mb4);
CONVERT 类型SELECT CONVERT('2026-07-23', DATE);
BINARYSELECT BINARY 'abc' = 'ABC';

加密与哈希函数

语句示例
MD5SELECT MD5('password');
SHA1SELECT SHA1('password');
SHA2SELECT SHA2('password', 256);
PASSWORDSELECT PASSWORD('secret');
AES_ENCRYPTSELECT AES_ENCRYPT('secret', 'key123');
AES_DECRYPTSELECT AES_DECRYPT(encrypted_data, 'key123');
UUIDSELECT UUID();
UUID_SHORTSELECT UUID_SHORT();
CRC32SELECT CRC32('hello');

JSON 函数

语句示例
JSON_EXTRACTSELECT JSON_EXTRACT('{"name":"张三","age":25}', '$.name');
JSON_EXTRACT 简写SELECT data->'$.name' FROM user_json;
JSON_UNQUOTESELECT data->>'$.name' FROM user_json;
JSON_SETUPDATE user_json SET data = JSON_SET(data, '$.age', 26) WHERE id = 1;
JSON_INSERTUPDATE user_json SET data = JSON_INSERT(data, '$.phone', '13800138000') WHERE id = 1;
JSON_REPLACEUPDATE user_json SET data = JSON_REPLACE(data, '$.name', '李四') WHERE id = 1;
JSON_REMOVEUPDATE user_json SET data = JSON_REMOVE(data, '$.phone') WHERE id = 1;
JSON_ARRAYSELECT JSON_ARRAY(1, 'hello', NOW());
JSON_OBJECTSELECT JSON_OBJECT('name', name, 'email', email) FROM users;
JSON_CONTAINSSELECT * FROM user_json WHERE JSON_CONTAINS(data, '"张三"', '$.name');
JSON_KEYSSELECT JSON_KEYS(data) FROM user_json WHERE id = 1;
JSON_LENGTHSELECT JSON_LENGTH(data) FROM user_json WHERE id = 1;
JSON_TYPESELECT JSON_TYPE(data) FROM user_json WHERE id = 1;
JSON_VALIDSELECT JSON_VALID(data) FROM user_json;
JSON_ARRAYAGGSELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(name) FROM users WHERE city = '北京';
JSON_OBJECTAGGSELECT JSON_OBJECTAGG(id, name) FROM users;
JSON_TABLESELECT jt.* FROM user_json, JSON_TABLE(data, '$' COLUMNS (name VARCHAR(50) PATH '$.name', age INT PATH '$.age')) AS jt;

全文搜索

语句示例
MATCH AGAINST 自然语言SELECT * FROM articles WHERE MATCH(title, content) AGAINST('MySQL 优化' IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE);
MATCH AGAINST 布尔SELECT * FROM articles WHERE MATCH(title, content) AGAINST('+MySQL -Oracle' IN BOOLEAN MODE);
MATCH AGAINST 扩展SELECT * FROM articles WHERE MATCH(title, content) AGAINST('数据库' WITH QUERY EXPANSION);
MATCH 相关性排序SELECT *, MATCH(title, content) AGAINST('MySQL') AS relevance FROM articles WHERE MATCH(title, content) AGAINST('MySQL') ORDER BY relevance DESC;

系统信息与状态

语句示例
SELECT VERSIONSELECT VERSION();
SHOW VARIABLESSHOW VARIABLES LIKE 'max_connections';
SHOW STATUSSHOW STATUS LIKE 'Threads_connected';
SHOW PROCESSLISTSHOW FULL PROCESSLIST;
SHOW ENGINESHOW ENGINE INNODB STATUS;
SHOW WARNINGSSHOW WARNINGS;
SHOW ERRORSSHOW ERRORS;
EXPLAINEXPLAIN SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '张三';
EXPLAIN FORMAT JSONEXPLAIN FORMAT = JSON SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '张三';
EXPLAIN ANALYZEEXPLAIN ANALYZE SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '张三';
KILLKILL 123;
KILL QUERYKILL QUERY 123;
SHOW CHARACTER SETSHOW CHARACTER SET;
SHOW COLLATIONSHOW COLLATION LIKE 'utf8mb4%';

备份与恢复

语句示例
mysqldump 全库mysqldump -u root -p --all-databases > backup.sql
mysqldump 单库mysqldump -u root -p mydb > mydb_backup.sql
mysqldump 单表mysqldump -u root -p mydb users > users_backup.sql
mysqldump 结构mysqldump -u root -p --no-data mydb > schema.sql
mysqldump 数据mysqldump -u root -p --no-create-info mydb > data.sql
mysqldump 存储过程mysqldump -u root -p --routines --no-create-info --no-data mydb > routines.sql
mysql 恢复mysql -u root -p mydb < mydb_backup.sql
SOURCESOURCE /path/to/backup.sql;
mysqlpumpmysqlpump -u root -p --databases mydb > backup.sql
mysqlhotcopymysqlhotcopy mydb /backup/

锁表

语句示例
LOCK TABLES READLOCK TABLES users READ;
LOCK TABLES WRITELOCK TABLES users WRITE;
LOCK TABLES 多表LOCK TABLES users READ, orders WRITE;
UNLOCK TABLESUNLOCK TABLES;
FLUSH TABLES WITH READ LOCKFLUSH TABLES WITH READ LOCK;

变量

语句示例
SET 用户变量SET @total = 0;
SELECT INTO 变量SELECT COUNT(*) INTO @total FROM users;
SET 会话变量SET SESSION sql_mode = 'STRICT_TRANS_TABLES';
SET 全局变量SET GLOBAL max_connections = 200;
SELECT 变量SELECT @total;
SET 多变量SET @a = 1, @b = 2, @c = @a + @b;

预处理语句

语句示例
PREPAREPREPARE stmt FROM 'SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?';
EXECUTESET @id = 1; EXECUTE stmt USING @id;
DEALLOCATE PREPAREDEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt;
PREPARE 动态SQLSET @table = 'users'; SET @sql = CONCAT('SELECT * FROM ', @table); PREPARE stmt FROM @sql; EXECUTE stmt; DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt;

MySQL 语句大全 — 共 32 个分类，200+ 条语句示例
